'''âj-b-ng''' ('''kajabang''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhythmicize|rhythmicize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhythmicize|rhythmicize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âj-b-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kajabang
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thijabang|thijabang]] || [[word:jijabang|jijabang]] || [[word:shijabang|shijabang]] || [[word:kijabang|kijabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthujabang|thuthujabang]] || [[word:jujujabang|jujujabang]] || [[word:shushujabang|shushujabang]] || [[word:kukujabang|kukujabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thujabang|thujabang]] || [[word:jujabang|jujabang]] || [[word:shujabang|shujabang]] || [[word:kujabang|kujabang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thujabang|thujabang]] || [[word:jujabang|jujabang]] || [[word:shujabang|shujabang]] || [[word:kujabang|kujabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thejabang|thejabang]] || [[word:jejabang|jejabang]] || [[word:shejabang|shejabang]] || [[word:kejabang|kejabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothojabang|thothojabang]] || [[word:jojojabang|jojojabang]] || [[word:shoshojabang|shoshojabang]] || [[word:kokojabang|kokojabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thojabang|thojabang]] || [[word:jojabang|jojabang]] || [[word:shojabang|shojabang]] || [[word:kojabang|kojabang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thojabang|thojabang]] || [[word:jojabang|jojabang]] || [[word:shojabang|shojabang]] || [[word:kojabang|kojabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠjabang|thĂŠjabang]] || [[word:jĂŠjabang|jĂŠjabang]] || [[word:shĂŠjabang|shĂŠjabang]] || [[word:kĂŠjabang|kĂŠjabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathajabang|thathajabang]] || [[word:jajajabang|jajajabang]] || [[word:shashajabang|shashajabang]] || [[word:kakajabang|kakajabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thajabang|thajabang]] || [[word:jajabang|jajabang]] || [[word:shajabang|shajabang]] || [[word:kajabang|kajabang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thajabang|thajabang]] || [[word:jajabang|jajabang]] || [[word:shajabang|shajabang]] || [[word:kajabang|kajabang]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shajabang|shajabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshajabang|goshajabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishajabang|gokishajabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shajabangnĂŒ|shajabangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshajabangnknĂŒ|goshajabangnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabangnĂŒ|gokishajabangnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shajabangshĂ«|shajabangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshajabangnkshĂ«|goshajabangnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishajabangshĂ«|gokishajabangshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabangro|shajabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabangnkro|goshajabangnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabangro|gokishajabangro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabangmu|shajabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabangnkmu|goshajabangnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabangmu|gokishajabangmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shajabangsher|shajabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshajabangnksher|goshajabangnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishajabangsher|gokishajabangsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shajabang|shajabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshajabangnkng|goshajabangnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishajabang|gokishajabang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shajabangya|shajabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshajabangnkya|goshajabangnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishajabangya|gokishajabangya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shajabangyam|shajabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshajabangnkyam|goshajabangnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishajabangyam|gokishajabangyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabangnĂŒshĂ«|shajabangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabangnknĂŒshĂ«|goshajabangnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabangnĂŒshĂ«|gokishajabangnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabangnĂŒro|shajabangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabangnknĂŒro|goshajabangnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabangnĂŒro|gokishajabangnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabangnĂŒmu|shajabangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabangnknĂŒmu|goshajabangnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabangnĂŒmu|gokishajabangnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabangshĂ«nĂŒ|shajabangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabangnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshajabangnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabangshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishajabangshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabangshĂ«ro|shajabangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabangnkshĂ«ro|goshajabangnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabangshĂ«ro|gokishajabangshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabangshĂ«mu|shajabangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabangnkshĂ«mu|goshajabangnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabangshĂ«mu|gokishajabangshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabangronĂŒ|shajabangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabangnkronĂŒ|goshajabangnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabangronĂŒ|gokishajabangronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabangroshĂ«|shajabangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabangnkroshĂ«|goshajabangnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabangroshĂ«|gokishajabangroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shajabangromu|shajabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshajabangnkromu|goshajabangnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishajabangromu|gokishajabangromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shajabangmunĂŒ|shajabangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshajabangnkmunĂŒ|goshajabangnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishajabangmunĂŒ|gokishajabangmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shajabangmushĂ«|shajabangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshajabangnkmushĂ«|goshajabangnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishajabangmushĂ«|gokishajabangmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shajabangmuro|shajabangmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshajabangnkmuro|goshajabangnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishajabangmuro|gokishajabangmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
